rapid_sequences.text: ⟦⟦ R̃ãp̃ĩd̃ ĩñp̃ũt̃ s̃ẽq̃ũẽñc̃ẽs̃ ĩñc̃r̃ẽãs̃ẽ c̃õõr̃d̃ĩñãt̃ĩõñ d̃ẽm̃ãñd̃. ⟧⟧

interleaving_patterns.text: ⟦⟦ D̃ĩf̃f̃ẽr̃ẽñt̃ ĩñp̃ũt̃ t̃ỹp̃ẽs̃ ĩñt̃ẽr̃l̃ẽãṽẽ t̃h̃r̃õũg̃h̃õũt̃ t̃h̃ẽ p̃ãt̃t̃ẽr̃ñ. ⟧⟧

high_load_coordination.text: ⟦⟦ H̃ĩg̃h̃ ĩñp̃ũt̃ l̃õãd̃ c̃ãñ s̃t̃r̃ẽs̃s̃ s̃ỹñc̃h̃r̃õñĩz̃ãt̃ĩõñ. ⟧⟧
